videos.title: Lighting Before Lockers? Hear Us Out.
videos.description:
#jeeplife  #rigidindustries  #bajadesigns 
Your trail doesn't care that you forgot to upgrade your lighting. 
It just gets dark. Really fast. Really far from home.

In this episode Paul and The Ginger illuminate everything you have ever wanted to know about off road lighting and a few things you did not know you needed to know until right now.

videos.title: Power Apps App and Host Objects Explained (Device, OS, and Screen Info)
videos.description: Ever needed your Power Apps app to behave differently depending on whether someone is on an iPhone, a PC, or running offline? This video walks you through the App and Host objects in Power Apps and shows you how to pull device, OS, browser, session, and screen information. You will see how to use Host for things like OS type and user agent, how App gives you the active screen, height, width, and theme colors, and how all of this helps you troubleshoot user issues or make responsive decisions in

videos.title: Midjourney breaks into ... healthcare? #AI #Medtech #MidjourneyMedical #Medicalbreakthrough
videos.description:
Midjourney medical is a real thing now. The AI image company built a full-body ultrasound.

It is cheaper than an MRI and faster. They want to run a billion scans a year, and apparently it is built to feel like a trip to the spa. The whole thing came out of a 40-person team that funds itself off the image business.

Here is the part that gets me. The most interesting AI move of the week did not come from OpenAI or Anthropic. It came from the company you thought only made pictures.

That is the s

videos.title: Nobody’s ready for Claude Fable 5 #Anthropic #AI #Fable5 #Claude
videos.description:
Claude Fable 5 was public for a few days, and the strange part was not just how good it was. It was realizing the new constraint might be us.

The model didn't run out of ability. I ran out of big things to ask for.

So the skill that matters now isn't prompting — it's learning to ask bigger. That's what the full breakdown gets into: https://natesnewsletter.substack.com/p/claude-fable-5-how-to-use?r=1z4sm5&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=true


My Links 🔗 Newslett

videos.title: How Big is the AI Economy
videos.description:
Alleged credit-based, identity-verified access for Anthropic Fable sparks privacy and policy debate. Senate draft targets agent neutrality and a duty-of-loyalty while state and corporate contracts shift pricing and access. Exponential View estimates a $175 billion annual AI run rate and documents a compute supercycle with surging token volumes and falling unit token prices.

The AI Daily Brief helps you understand the most important news and discussions in AI. 
Subscribe to the podcast version o

videos.title: Mythos Returns But Not For Everyone
videos.description: The Commerce Department authorized limited, vetted access to Anthropic's Mythos and signaled a de facto licensing regime for frontier models. OpenAI previewed GPT‑5.6 (Sol, Terra, Luna) under a trusted‑partner rollout, igniting debate over benchmarks, safety measures, and government review processes. Rising adoption of Chinese open‑weight models like GLM 5.2 and corporate moves to cheaper defaults highlight geopolitical competition, cybersecurity tradeoffs, and the risk of concentrated access to
